Bitte gib deine TWINT-Handynummer an, da: Please enter your TWINT mobile number so that we can request the payment.
Wir senden dir eine TWINT-Zahlungsanford: We will send you a TWINT payment request to this number.
Sende den Betrag via TWINT an %s – Detai: Send the amount via TWINT to %s – you will receive the details after ordering.
